scenarios.title: Plumbing Code Compliance Check

conversation_flow.message: I need to confirm if the Wilkins 975XL meets ASSE 1013 requirements for a California commercial project
Also need the NSF/ANSI 61 certification documentation

success_criteria: Agent confirms or denies ASSE 1013 compliance
Agent provides path to certification documentation

scenarios.title: Warranty Claim — Installed Product Failure

conversation_flow.message: I installed a Zurn Z886 6 months ago and it's already failing. Need to file a warranty claim.
Install date was October 2024, I have the invoice

success_criteria: Agent collects product and install date
Agent initiates or explains claim process
